word: G3812 - παιδιόθεν - paidióthen - pahee-dee-oth'-en - Of a child

sections.paragraph:
- Original: παιδιόθεν

- Transliteration: Paidiothen

- Phonetic: pahee-dee-oth'-en

- Definition:

1. from childhood, from a child

- Origin: from (of source) from G3813

- TDNT entry: None

- Part(s) of speech: Adverb

- Strong's: Adverb (of source) from G3813; from infancy: - of a child.
